task_name: Add New AI Image Provider to Vercel AI SDK

plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan: `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider

Here's what I'll create — modeled directly after `@ai-sdk/black-forest-labs`, the simplest image-only provider in the codebase:

### Files to create under `packages/pixelart/` (9 files)

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | `@ai-sdk/pixelart` v1.0.0, workspace deps, CJS+ESM exports |
| `tsconfig.json` | Extends `@vercel/ai-tsconfig/ts-library.json`, references `../provider` + `../provider-utils` |
| `tsconfig.build.json` | Same with `composite: false` for tsup |
| `tsup.config.ts` | Dual CJS+ESM build, `dts`, `sourcemap`, `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` injection |
| `src/version.ts` | Build-time version constant |
| `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` | Exports `PixelArtImageModelId` and `PixelArtImageSettings` (with `size`, `style`, `pixelDensity`) |
| `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel` implementing `ImageModelV3`; POSTs to `/generate`; provider-specific options via Zod + `parseProviderOptions` |
| `src/pixelart-provider.ts` | `createPixelArt` factory + `pixelArt` default; throws `NoSuchModelError` for language/embedding |
| `src/index.ts` | Re-exports all public API |

### Key design decisions
- **`size`** flows from standard `ImageModelV3CallOptions`; **`style`** and **`pixelDensity`** come from `providerOptions.pixelart` (standard SDK pattern for provider-specific params)
- **`aspectRatio`**, **`files`**, **`mask`** emit `unsupported` warnings (fictional API doesn't support them)
- **`maxImagesPerCall = 1`** — synchronous API, no polling needed (simpler than BFL)
- Images returned as **base64 strings** (`ImageModelV3` supports `Array<string> | Array<Uint8Array>`)
- API key loaded from **`PIXELART_API_KEY`** env var via `loadApiKey`
- Base URL: `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1`
